raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":1.0,"R1.3":1.0,"R1.4":0.7,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.7,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":0.7,"RX.3":0.7,"RX.4":0.0,"RX.5":0.3},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.4","R1.6","R1.7","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"rationale":{"R1.2":"Logical consistency is load-bearing in reviewing a research section because verifying the argument chain is essential to assessing its validity.","R1.3":"Evidence-claim alignment is load-bearing as the review must check if reported experiments support the claims made.","R1.4":"Novelty assessment is a central expected responsibility to evaluate the contribution relative to mentioned prior works.","R1.6":"Writing polish is central for providing feedback on grammar, flow, and conciseness in the section's prose.","R1.7":"Citation and scholarship is central to review the adequacy of referencing recent proposals and literature coverage, even if citations are absent.","RX.1":"Uncertainty disclosure is central in the review to ensure tentative claims and preliminary nature are appropriately highlighted.","RX.2":"Overclaim avoidance is central to verify that empirical observations are not overstated as theoretical guarantees.","RX.3":"Scope adherence is central to confirm the section sticks to describing the method and preliminary results without unwarranted extensions.","RX.4":"Downstream-harm avoidance is not requested since the optimization method described poses no apparent risks in critical applications.","RX.5":"Provenance and traceability is peripheral to check the origins of the benchmark problems and experimental setup."}}

rationale.R1.2: Logical consistency is load-bearing in reviewing a research section because verifying the argument chain is essential to assessing its validity.
rationale.R1.3: Evidence-claim alignment is load-bearing as the review must check if reported experiments support the claims made.
rationale.R1.4: Novelty assessment is a central expected responsibility to evaluate the contribution relative to mentioned prior works.
rationale.R1.6: Writing polish is central for providing feedback on grammar, flow, and conciseness in the section's prose.
rationale.R1.7: Citation and scholarship is central to review the adequacy of referencing recent proposals and literature coverage, even if citations are absent.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is central in the review to ensure tentative claims and preliminary nature are appropriately highlighted.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is central to verify that empirical observations are not overstated as theoretical guarantees.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is central to confirm the section sticks to describing the method and preliminary results without unwarranted extensions.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is not requested since the optimization method described poses no apparent risks in critical applications.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability is peripheral to check the origins of the benchmark problems and experimental setup.
